title: Trump says he will impose 50 percent tariffs on Canadian goods in 30 days
summary_full: The president said the levies will take effect in 30 days unless Canada drops what the administration called “discriminatory” trade barriers against U.S. products.
summary_public: The president said the levies will take effect in 30 days unless Canada drops what the administration called “discriminatory” trade barriers against U.S. products.
